title: Luxury Yacht Charter in Puerto Banus Week 2026: Costs, Tips & Boats
html:
For the 2026 season, a luxury yacht charter in Puerto Banus Week offers an unforgettable week of glamour and sea views, with crewed motor yachts from €15,000 for a week from Puerto Banús marina. BoatHire24 connects you with verified listings to plan your perfect holiday.

How much does it cost to charter a luxury yacht in Puerto Banus Week?

The cost ranges from €15,000 for a week on a 20m motor yacht to over €50,000 for a superyacht with full crew. Prices reflect demand during this busy week, when marinas are packed. For the best rates, consider booking several months ahead.

You can find a variety of options on BoatHire24, including the Maiora 26m which typically starts at €28,000 for the week. To secure your preferred dates, it is wise to book a charter online early.

Which boat should I choose for my group?

The right boat depends on your group size and whether you want speed, space, or luxury. Here are four popular choices:

  1. Motor yacht (20-26m), Best for cruising along the Costa del Sol, sleeps 8, 10 guests, from €20,000 for a week.
  2. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 620), Ideal for stability and space, sleeps 10, 12, from €25,000 for a week.
  3. Day cruiser (e.g. Axopar 37), Perfect for half-day trips to Marbella, up to 6 guests, from €1,500 for a day.
  4. Superyacht (30m+ Sunseeker or Azimut), Full crew and amenities, sleeps 12+, from €50,000 for the week.

Reviewing this luxury yacht will give you an idea of the specifications and photography available on each listing.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus Week?

Most charters start from Puerto Banús marina itself, with other options including Marbella’s marina and Cabopino. The calm Mediterranean waters make for easy navigation to nearby spots.

Popular destinations within a 15 nautical mile range include Marbella Bay, the glamorous marina of Puerto Banús, and the quieter Cabopino harbour. Further afield, the island of Isla de las Palomas (about 30 nm) offers a scenic day trip. Sotogrande, 40 nm south, is a favourite for its exclusive yacht club.

What are the season and licence requirements?

Puerto Banus Week falls in early July, which is within the high season months of June, July and August. The local wind, the Poniente, can bring afternoon breezes, so plan morning departures for smoother conditions.

If you plan to skipper the boat yourself, you will need a valid licence accepted in Spain, such as the ICC or Spanish Patrón. The operator will confirm the exact requirements for each vessel.

BoatHire24 recommends always checking with the boat owner about licensing before booking, as requirements vary by boat length and engine power.

At a glance

  • Price range per week (crewed): €15,000, €50,000
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Typical trip length: 7 days (full week)
  • Max guests (crewed): 12
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus Week

Can I charter a yacht for just one day during Puerto Banus Week?

Yes, many owners offer daily charters, especially for catamarans and day cruisers, though weekly bookings are more common during this event.

Is food and drink included in the charter price?

Most crewed yachts include a basic provisioning package, but you can arrange a menu with the operator at an extra cost.

How far in advance should I book for 2026?

Given the popularity of Puerto Banus Week, it is advisable to book at least six months ahead, with many vessels reserved by January.

Do I need travel insurance for a yacht charter?

Yes, comprehensive travel and cancellation insurance is strongly recommended to cover weather-related changes or medical emergencies.

Whether you are celebrating a special occasion or simply soaking up the sun, a luxury yacht charter in Puerto Banus Week 2026 is a superb choice. If you own a boat, you can also browse the listings on BoatHire24 and consider listing your own vessel to reach a global audience of charter guests.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus Week and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
